title: Optimizing Web Performance: Advanced Image Strategies

questions.sentence: Images are often the largest assets on a webpage and can significantly impact the loading speed of your application.
Adopting advanced image optimization strategies is essential for passing Google's 'Lighthouse' audits.
One of the most effective modern techniques is using next-generation image formats like 'WebP' or 'AVIF'.
These formats provide superior compression compared to traditional JPEG and PNG files, often reducing file size by up to 50% without a noticeable loss in quality.

Combining these techniques with 'Lazy Loading' (using the loading='lazy' attribute) ensures that users only download the assets they need, providing a faster and more efficient experience for everyone.
